title: The Nyaban Brothers Enter the Battle
description: On pages 5–8, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Now it will be impossible to finish them off in 5 minutes...!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I've done my best, the rest is up to you!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: This is a battle that we definitely...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm doing it for the treasure!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Even the evil butler is here...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: All of you will be dead

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Even though we have Captain Jango and Buchi-san, but only three more minutes...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: How can we finish off these people....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Buchi! We don't have any more time!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You go and kill the guy with the stomach band!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I'll deal with the straw- hat kid....!!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
